benefits.description: Comically increased appetite and overeating on Ipamorelin 2-3mg twice daily

side_effects.description: Significant appetite increase, able to consume ~8000 calories

protocol_notes: User reports phase 2 clinical trial ran Ipamorelin at 2-3mg twice daily (30mcg/kg). Phase 1 had doses up to 7-10mg (100mcg/kg). States that typical peptide protocol is 1/10th of clinical dose. Also mentions using Retatrutide 12mg with significant appetite effects. Notes Ipamorelin requires GHRH (Tesamorelin, Sermorelin, or CJC-1295) for meaningful GH release at typical protocol doses.
